original_abstract: This community service program aims to build independence and entrepreneurial character among the students of Pondok Pesantren Nurul Amanah Bangkalan through the Asset-Based Community Development (ABCD) approach. The activity involved 10th and 11th-grade students in entrepreneurship training based on the pesantren's business units, such as Bakso Gibras, Nasi Ayam Chili Padi, AMDK, mushroom cultivation, and catfish farming. The methods used include theoretical training on mu'amalah in the context of sharia entrepreneurship and hands-on experience in the pesantren's business units. The results show that the students actively participated in the operations of these businesses and were able to identify opportunities and challenges in managing the businesses. With the ABCD approach, the students gained not only entrepreneurial skills but also social and religious values that support the economic development of the pesantren. This program successfully contributed to the empowerment of the students while developing the pesantren's business units as a sustainable learning tool.
humanized_abstract: The Community Service titled “Empowering Students through Entrepreneurial Character at Pondok Pesantren Nurul Amanah Bangkalan” is intended to give empowerment and exposure towards entrepreneurial character for students of Pondok Pesantren Nurul Amanah Bangkalan, Madura using Asset-Based Community Development (ABCD) approach. This activity involved the students of class 3-4 SMP PNPBA Bangkalan to receive training of business skills of some product of various units of economy of PNPBA such as Bakso Gibras, Nasi Ayam Chili Padi, AMDK (Manufacturer of Mushroom Derivative), Mushroom culture, and Catfish farming with the implementation of theoretical training toward the concept of mu’amalah in Shariah economy as well as providing direct practice of students in relating with the product of economy of PNPBA. The activity reached several achievements and consequences, such as student participation in running the economy of business units at PNPBA who can determine and understand the opportunity and challenge in the economy of each product. Based on ABCD principles, this community service is given more benefits to students not only on empowering entrepreneurial skill but also on other skill, either social or religius skill that is relevant to the increase of the economy in PNPB Madura. The participation of students in the economy of PNPBA can increase sustainability of development and its roles as a new tool of learning for students.
